chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI. C.P No. D-2505 of 2024 Date Order with Signature(s) of the Judge (s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.11422 of 2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 25.08.2025. Mr. Abdul Khalique Qazi, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. K.A Vaswani, AAG. Mr. Nazir Ahmed, Assistant Registrar Cooperative Societies Department. ************* The petitioner has challenged the order dated 17.05.2024 passed by Registrar Cooperative Societies, Sindh Karachi, whereby Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Siddiqui, Deputy Registrar, Cooperative Societies-II, Karachi, was appointed as Inquiry Officer. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he has no objection to the inquiry; however, it should be conducted strictly in accordance with law. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with directions to the Respondents to carry out the inquiry in accordance with law and complete the same within sixty days. The petitioner is directed to cooperate with the Inquiry Officer. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS*
